title: neoboutonia mannii
intro: Neoboutonia mannii, also known as African Ironwood, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Neoboutonia mannii include reducing inflammation, fighting off bacterial and fungal infections, and improving immune function, making it a valuable herbal remedy in traditional African medicine. Neoboutonia mannii can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
